modules.source_status_flag: Generated from approved Module 16 PDF source map.
learning_objectives: Describe the five stages of the grieving process according to Dr. Kubler-Ross
Describe approaches to meet common emotional and spiritual needs of terminally ill patients/residents and their families
List the rights of the dying patient/resident
Differentiate between common signs of approaching death and biological death
Identify care and comfort measures for dying patients/residents
Identify the philosophy and goals of hospice and the Nurse Assistant's role when the patient/resident is cared for by a licensed hospice nurse
Describe procedures and responsibilities for postmortem care
